description_long: This object is a slender, elongated sword with a straight, narrow blade that tapers to a sharp point, characteristic of a rapier. The blade is metallic and highly reflective, suggesting it is made of polished steel. The hilt features an ornate swept-hilt guard with multiple curved bars and loops, providing hand protection and a decorative flourish. The handle is cylindrical and appears to be wrapped or textured for grip, ending in a rounded pommel. The overall design is elegant and functional, typical of swords used for thrusting in dueling or ceremonial contexts. The color scheme is predominantly dark metallic, with subtle highlights from the polished surfaces.
description: A slender, straight-bladed rapier with an ornate swept-hilt guard and a cylindrical, textured handle. The sword is metallic and highly reflective, with elegant protective features.
description_view_0: Front view shows the narrow blade and the ornate swept-hilt guard, with the handle and pommel visible at the top.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the full length of the straight, thin blade and the profile of the guard and handle.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the blade's alignment and the back of the guard and handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again displaying the blade's length and the side profile of the guard and handle.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, possibly wood or leather-wrapped, with a rounded pommel and ornate swept-hilt guard
attribute_ornamentation: ornate swept-hilt guard with decorative curves
